wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Rubik:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Rubik',sans-serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#ffffff!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#064e3b!important;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(6,78,59,.4)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{padding:13px 24px!important;color:#064e3b!important;font-weight:500!important;letter-spacing:.02em;transition:all .25s;border-left:3px solid transparent;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{border-left-color:#059669!important;background:rgba(5,150,105,.07)!important;color:#047857!important;} #wprmenu_menu_ul li{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(6,78,59,.06)!important;} .store-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#064e3b,#065f46);padding:24px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(167,243,208,.15);} .store-promo{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(167,243,208,.15);border:1px solid rgba(167,243,208,.25);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px;margin-bottom:10px;} .store-promo span{color:#a7f3d0;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;} .store-header h4{color:#ecfdf5;font-size:17px;font-weight:600;margin:0 0 3px;} .store-header p.sub{color:#a7f3d0;font-size:12px;margin:0;} .store-cart-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:12px 24px;background:#f0fdf4;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(6,78,59,.07);} .store-cart-bar span{font-size:12px;color:#065f46;font-weight:500;} .store-cart-btn{background:#059669;color:#ffffff!important;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none!important;letter-spacing:.05em;} .wpr_social_icons{padding:12px 24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(6,78,59,.07);display:flex;gap:10px;} .wpr_social_icons a{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(6,78,59,.07);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{background:#059669;}
